ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the customer (e.g., senior, middle_aged) */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "student" TEXT /* Whether the customer is a student (yes/no) */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the customer (e.g., fair, excellent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer ID */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product purchased */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "buys_system" TEXT /* Indicates whether the customer bought the system (yes/#) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_info" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, executive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_user" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
